svg.title: Full architecture diagram — Figma to Live Pages
svg.desc: Three swim lanes: Build Time, Deploy Time, Runtime. Shows Figma plugin pipeline, Page Definition Service, Assembler GraphQL, and Next.js SSR renderer.
svg.text: PUT by CI · GET at runtime
New componentType = developer builds React component
+ adds to registry + redeploy. Everything else: no redeploy.
Filter / sort = HTML form GET → full page reload
Server re-renders. Browser receives new complete HTML.
